title: Do Evangelions have an innate personallity
display_title: Do Evangelions have an innate personallity
wikitext:
[]: Do Evangelions have an innate personallity?             Quote Post by evilhead008 » Tue Jan 08, 2008 9:12 pm Specifically, this question came out of the blue... We know the souls inside each Eva... 00: Rei I 01: Yui-sama 02: Kyoko (all of it by EoE) 03: Toji's mom 04: N/A 05-13: N/A But specifically for Units 00-02... When each unit goes Berserk or "out of control," or even wiith the pilots in control, what happens? In the manga, along with Yui's soul, we also see Unit-01 herself trying to contact Shinji; she is depicted as an unarmored, sometimes bleeding entity trailing wires and plugs. I'm aware that its the resident soul inside that triggers the Berserker Mode, but is it actually Rei I/Yui/Kyoko that tear people apart and eat them? Do they actually force the Eva to do all these things? Are Evangelions simply puppets, and without a human soul inside, incapable of doing anything and are nothing more than lumps of flesh? If we assume that Rei I/Yui/Kyoko only trigger the Evangelion's animalistic instincts, it stands to reason that each Evangelion itself also has some kind of self-awareness, or at least consciousness when "awakened" by Rei I/Yui/Kyoko. The instances: Unit-00 going out of control, and punching windows and walls, followed by ramming its head against the wall. Rei I seems to be in full control during this. Battle VS. Sachiel: Yui re-activates the Eva, but does she do the fighting? Battle VS Leleil: Yui re-activates the Eva and saves Shinji, but does she actually rip Leleil apart? Battle VS Zereul: Yui eats Zereul? Battle VS Arael: Is Unit-02 or Kyoko actually harmed? Battle VS Arimsael: Does the Eva herself actually feel the pain? Battle VS Harpies: Is it Kyoko, Asuka, or the Evangelion yelling at the JSSDF/UN? When Unit-02 is fighting, does it simply speak what she says in grunts, or is it Kyoko repeating it through the Eva? Does the Eva talk? When she re-activates and her eyes start glowing, is this Kyoko, or is it Unit-02 herself? Please discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jan 08, 2008 9:20 pm In all these cases of Evas ripping apart or eating things, the resident soul is in full control. Kyoko and Asuka had reached an unprecedented synch ratio between themselves, which is why mother and daughter vocalized at the same time.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Jan 08, 2008 11:15 pm The reason the evas act all animalistic is because the souls have been stuck inside those things so long. If your soul was stuck inside a giant robot looking thing for years you'd probably go nuts the first chance you got to do things on your own too!

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Wed Jan 09, 2008 3:31 am I think there is a personality INSIDE them, not necessarily veiwable from outside.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Jan 09, 2008 11:08 am evilhead008 wrote: We know the souls inside each Eva... 00: Rei I

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Jan 09, 2008 11:53 am Zugzwang wrote: evilhead008 wrote: We know the souls inside each Eva... 00: Rei I

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Jan 09, 2008 12:16 pm Shin-seiki wrote: ('Bug-eyed, floating head Rei' being identified as Rei 1 in #25 is particularly definitive)

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Jan 09, 2008 12:31 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Actually, we do know that; you seem, amazingly enough, to have found some way to discount all the evidence that points that way ('Bug-eyed, floating head Rei' being identified as Rei 1 in #25 is particularly definitive), but most all of the rest of us understand that the issue is basically resolved, and carry on from there...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 09, 2008 12:39 pm If we're going to rehash the Eva-00 debate, please bump one of the older threads.

[]:             Quote Post by evilhead008 » Wed Jan 09, 2008 4:37 pm Fine, WHATEVER SOUL IS INSIDE UNIT-00.
